mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_post (user_id, title, content, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 1)
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_post
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{postId} and user_id= #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_post WHERE status = 1

select t.title,t.content,t.like_count, t.collect_count,t.comment_count,t.id,u.id as userId,u.username from t_post t left join sys_user u on u.id =t.user_id
t.title like concat('%',#{name},'%')
